---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ACL
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the motivation?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe a concrete example of how this feature would be used.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, diagrams, or references that might help.
